projectProgress.lastUpdatedPrompt: Verify the tracker contains the current project progress and make it up to date.

details.detail: Express TypeScript service is scaffolded with ESM, CORS, dotenv, and pino logging.
Health route plus weather/current, weather/forecast, and weather/air-quality endpoints are implemented.
OpenWeather calls are isolated in a service layer with typed response shaping and centralized error handling.
Startup fails fast if OPENWEATHER_API_KEY is missing.
FastAPI service is scaffolded with lifespan startup checks, logging, dotenv, and CORS.
LangChain Gemini agent is wired with three wrapper-backed tools: current weather, forecast, and air quality.
POST /chat accepts message and optional history, logs a truncated user message preview, and handles 400, 502, and 500 cases.
Validation error handling was updated to encode request errors safely so bad chat payloads return 400 instead of 500 after server restart.
Startup fails fast if GEMINI_API_KEY or MCP_WRAPPER_URL is missing.
Base Vite React TypeScript scaffold created with a placeholder App component.
No weather UI or backend integration has been implemented yet.

notes.note: Backend validation fix is present in code but requires the running uvicorn process to be restarted if an old process is still serving requests.
Use this file as the running tracker for subsequent prompts in this chat.
